productDisplayName: Puma Men Wind Black Track Pant
description: Composition Black track pants made of 100% polyester on the outside with an inner mesh lining, has an elasticated waistband with a drawstring on the inseam, two zippered pockets on the sides, zippered enclosures on either sides of the hem, mesh panel at the back, grey tipping on the sides, graphic branding below the left pocket Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash inside out with like colours using lukewarm water Do not bleach, or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron Do not iron on decorations Soft on the inside and sporty on the outside, these track pants from puma make a great addition to your casual wardrobe. Crafted from a polyester/nylon blend, these pants are ideal for your Sports training, jogging sessions or just laid back weekends. The soft blended fabric keeps you dry and comfortable and the sporty look does wonders for your casual style. Pair this with a sporty T-shirt and running shoes. Model Statistics Model is a size M of height 6' and waist 28"
